message:
feat(core): add search metrics to diagnostics and expand agent name vocabulary

Diagnostics (diagnostics.rs):
- Add SearchMetricsSnapshot to DiagnosticReport for search V3 monitoring
- Add operational recommendations for search health:
  - Warning when fallback-to-legacy count > 0 (V3 availability issues)
  - Warning when shadow mode V3 errors detected
  - Warning when shadow equivalence < 80% parity target
  - Critical when V3 queries run but Tantivy doc_count is 0

These recommendations help operators identify search rollout issues
before they impact users, enabling proactive intervention during the
gradual V3 migration.

Agent Names (models.rs):
- Add 3 new nouns to valid agent name vocabulary: horizon, orchid, duck
- Update noun count from 70 to 73 (62 adjectives × 73 nouns = 4,526 names)
- Add test cases for newly added name combinations
- Update documentation to reflect new vocabulary size

The expanded name pool reduces collision probability as more agents
are registered across projects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
